title: Missing connection for ordered list connection to an input port with default value result in error

features.name: ordered port connection omitting input port with default value
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation using ordered (positional) port connection where an input port with a default value is omitted from the connection list
features.snippet:
module def(output logic a, input logic x, input logic y = 1'b1); endmodule
module test(output logic a, input logic x); def def_I(a, x); endmodule
